Fields.Name: Midst SFX ID
Fields.Description: In effect SfxID (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Midst SE ID
Fields.Description: In effect SeID (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Start SFX ID
Fields.Description: SfxID at activation (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Start SE ID
Fields.Description: When activated SeID (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: End SFX ID
Fields.Description: SfxID at the time of cancellation (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: End SE ID
Fields.Description: SeID at the time of release (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Start Distance
Fields.Description: It is the camouflage start distance

Fields.Name: Camouflage - End Distance
Fields.Description: It is the camouflage end distance

Fields.Name: Transform - Protector ID
Fields.Description: Makeover Armor ID (-1: None)

Fields.Name: Midst Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: In effect Damipoli ID (-1: Root)

Fields.Name: Start Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID at the time of activation (-1: root)

Fields.Name: End Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID at the time of cancellation (-1: root)

Fields.Name: Effect Type
Fields.Description: Effect type

Fields.Name: Weapon Enchant - Soul Param ID
Fields.Description: Soul Param ID for Weapon Enchantment (-1: None). Change the applied Phantom Param.

Fields.Name: Play Category
Fields.Description: Controls effect playback due to duplicate effects

Fields.Name: Play Priority
Fields.Description: Set the playback priority when the categories match (lower one has priority)

Fields.Name: Large Effect Exists
Fields.Description: Is there a large effect?

Fields.Name: Soul Effect Exists
Fields.Description: Is there an effect for the soul body?

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Invisible while Active
Fields.Description: Whether to hide the effect when hiding

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Enable
Fields.Description: Do you hide

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Invisible for Friend
Fields.Description: Is it hidden even by allies when hiding?

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Hide Foot Effect
Fields.Description: Do you want to turn off the foot effect when hiding?

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Translucent Appearance
Fields.Description: Only translucent appearance

Fields.Name: Is Full Body Protector ID
Fields.Description: Is the transformation armor ID for the whole body?

Fields.Name: Is Invisible Weapon
Fields.Description: Invisible Weapon for Weapon Enchantment (0: Weapon Show, 1: Weapon Hide)

Fields.Name: Is Silent
Fields.Description: Is it silence? (0: No, 1: Yes)

Fields.Name: Is Midst SFX Full Body
Fields.Description: Do you use whole body Damipoli for equipping SFX during effect? Play SFX from torso: 190, head: 191, hands: 192, legs: 193 at 1

Fields.Name: Is Start SFX Full Body
Fields.Description: Do you use the whole body Damipoli for equipping SFX during activation? Play SFX from torso: 190, head: 191, hands: 192, legs: 193 at 1

Fields.Name: Is End SFX Full Body
Fields.Description: Do you use the whole body Damipoli for equipping SFX at the time of release? Play SFX from torso: 190, head: 191, hands: 192, legs: 193 at 1

Fields.Name: Is Visible on Dead Chr
Fields.Description: If , VFX will be displayed even when the corpse is dead.

Fields.Name: Use Enchant SFX Size to Offset SFX ID
Fields.Description: Whether to offset the SfxId according to the enchantment Sfx size of the weapon para

Fields.Name: Decal ID [0]
Fields.Description: Decal ID 1 (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Decal ID [1]
Fields.Description: Decal ID 2 (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Foot Effect Priority
Fields.Description: Foot effect offset priority (lower is higher)

Fields.Name: Foot Effect Offset
Fields.Description: Amount offset to foot effect ID when this special effect is applied

Fields.Name: Trace SFX ID Offset Type
Fields.Description: The offset value applied to the sword flash SFX ID. Used for enchantment and sword trajectory effects

Fields.Name: Force Deceased Type
Fields.Description: A function that can force the appearance of a character to be alive / dead

Fields.Name: Enchant SFX Start - Dummy Poly ID [0]

Fields.Description: Damipoli ID generated at the tip of the sword at the time of enchantment. -1 If specified, it will be automatically put out to the point where it is a serial number.

Fields.Name: SFX ID Offset Type
Fields.Description: SfxID offset type

Fields.Name: Phantom Param Overwrite Type
Fields.Description: Forced overwrite type of phantom parameters

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Min Alpha
Fields.Description: Minimum  value when hiding [%]

Fields.Name: Wet Aspect Type
Fields.Description: Generate a wet expression by referring to the wet parameter

Fields.Name: Phantom Param Overwrite ID
Fields.Description: Forced Id of phantom parameter

Fields.Name: Material Param ID
Fields.Description: ID0-99 are GS reservation IDs. If ID100 or later is specified, the material extension parameter is referenced (-1: invalid value).

Fields.Name: Material Param - Start Fade
Fields.Description: The value at the start of the fade of the material parameter. The target is specified by the material parameter ID. If the material parameter ID is -1, do nothing

Fields.Name: Material Param - End Fade
Fields.Description: The value at the end of the fade of the material parameter. The target is specified by the material parameter ID. If the material parameter ID is -1, do nothing

Fields.Name: Material Param - Fade Time
Fields.Description: Fade time for material parameter values. Gradually reach the target value over this time. If the material parameter ID is -1, do nothing

Fields.Name: Foot Decal Material Offset Overwrite ID
Fields.Description: Forcibly rewrite the floor material ID offset of the foot decal (-1 unused)
